title: AI Image AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Hyper-real cinematic night portrait defined by a moving headlight beam. Subject: an adult woman with calm but alert eyes, with slightly disheveled wind-tousled hair, wearing a distressed black leather jacket. Light Mechanic: A sweeping white headlight beam cuts across the face from camera-left to lower-right, briefly lighting the eyes, cheek, and hair while the rest falls into deep shadow. Scene: wet downtown street with blurred car lights, urban night atmosphere with motion feel and shallow background depth. Composition: Tight close-up, diagonal light slash, subject caught between brightness and shadow, realistic skin pores and hair strands. Color Grade: cool blue shadows with clean white headlight highlights; emotional tone is fleeting, guarded, cinematic. Restrictions: No plastic skin, no distorted facial anatomy, no horror gore, no excessive lens flare, no random text or watermark.
